_comment: Comprehensive SD1.5 artist list: 750+ unique artists verified for Stable Diffusion 1.5. Sources: Avaray/stable-diffusion-simple-wildcards, SupaGruen CheatSheet (833+ tested), urania.ai (1833 artists), gnickm/stable-diffusion-artists, OneButtonPrompt (3400+ database), and community research. Organized alphabetically, all formatted as 'by Artist Name' for direct prompt injection.
